scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run frontend:dev" "pnpm run backend:dev"
scripts.build:all: pnpm run backend:build && pnpm run frontend:build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run backend:typecheck && pnpm run frontend:typecheck
scripts.backend:dev: CONFIG_PATH=../config.toml PORT=3001 FRONTEND_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 APP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3001,http://localhost:3000 pnpm --filter @ink-battles/backend dev
